title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.478 - Penalty
text:
105.478.  Penalty. — Any person guilty of knowingly violating any of the provisions of sections 105.450 to 105.498 shall be punished as follows:
  (1)  For the first offense, such person is guilty of a class B misdemeanor;
  (2)  For the second and subsequent offenses, such person is guilty of a class E felony.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1610 § 14, A.L. 1990 H.B. 1650 & 1565, A.L. 1991 S.B. 262, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
